inputs.shares_source: 104,912,853 ordinary shares at June 30, 2025 (20-F FY2025 cover page)
inputs.shares_fully_diluted_note: Excludes ~14.5M shares for Tanbreez Stage 2 (92.5%), GEM warrant settlement, and warrant overhang [HUMAN REVIEW]
inputs.cash_source: Cash on hand $7.3M at June 30, 2025 (20-F FY2025 going-concern disclosure)
inputs.total_assets_source: Total assets $171.7M at June 30, 2025 vs $59.4M prior year (20-F balance sheet / filing_facts)
inputs.tanbreez_ownership_source: 42% equity interest in Tanbreez Mining Greenland A/S (20-F FY2025 Item 4.D)
inputs.tanbreez_resource_source: Indicated 25.42 Mt + Inferred 19.45 Mt = 44.87 Mt at 0.38% TREO (20-F Tanbreez resource table)
inputs.pea_npv_source: Company PEA press release March 31, 2025 cited in 20-F; pre-tax project NPV ~$3B at 12.5-15% discount [Assumption — not equity NAV]
inputs.wolfsberg_resource_source: Measured+Indicated 9.7 Mt at 1.03% Li2O + Inferred 3.1 Mt at 0.90% Li2O (20-F Wolfsberg table)
inputs.bmw_advance_source: BMW offtake advance payment $15.0M June 5, 2024; restricted until Wolfsberg production (20-F)
inputs.normalization_note: Pre-production explorer/evaluator. No mining revenue. Lawrence owner cash is negative (operating outflow). Value is risked asset option on Tanbreez (Greenland REE), Wolfsberg (Austria lithium), and minority lithium stakes — not filing OCF.

bear.notes: Greenland permitting delay or DFS failure; GEM arbitration cash/shares; repeated equity raises; cash floor erodes; Tanbreez option impaired

base.notes: Partial risked value on 42% Tanbreez stake after DFS, financing, and dilution; Wolfsberg/BMW path delayed; heavy haircut vs company PEA NPV

lines.label: Tanbreez 42% stake (risked NAV)
lines.math: [Assumption] ~15% probability-weighted share of risked project equity vs PEA headline NPV

lines.label: Wolfsberg lithium option
lines.math: [Assumption] Inferred resource; BMW offtake path; zero in Lawrence FCF

lines.label: Future dilution (Stage 2 + GEM)
lines.math: 14.5M shares to Rimbal for 92.5%; GEM arbitration overhang

sotp_build.notes: Partial risked value on 42% Tanbreez stake after DFS, financing, and dilution

bull.notes: Tanbreez DFS supports mine build; Stage 2 to 92.5%; offtake with Ucore/BMW converts; REE price tailwind; financing without catastrophic dilution

nav_overlay.source: 20-F FY2025 Tanbreez resource table + PEA disclosure

gaap_vs_fair_value.note: Mineral rights and exploration assets on balance sheet ($171.7M total assets) are not marked to PEA NPV; PEA is pre-tax project-level and highly uncertain

options.label: Tanbreez Greenland REE (42% economic interest)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Inferred portion of 44.87 Mt resource; Greenland jurisdiction; no reserves; PEA NPV not bankable until DFS
options.evidence: 20-F resource table; PEA press release March 31, 2025

options.label: Wolfsberg Austria lithium
options.base_terminal_rationale: BMW $15M advance and offtake LOI; inferred resource only
options.evidence: 20-F Wolfsberg section; BMW Offtake Agreement June 2024

options.label: Weinebene / Eastern Alps lithium (20%)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Early-stage minority stake; zero until resource and path clarified

optionality_gate.notes: Cash floor ~$0.07/sh is not dhando protection at $6.40. Primary metric is seven-year risked asset payoff scenario.

evidence_refresh.notes: Rare earth and lithium spot inform overlay context; not auto-included in Lawrence base IRR

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Total assets $171.7M includes mineral interests; PEA cites ~$3B pre-tax project NPV vs $7.3M cash (20-F)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: 44.87 Mt Tanbreez resource (mostly inferred); 4.7 Bt host rock kakortokite; no production (20-F)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Net loss $51.9M FY2025; operating cash outflow $14.5M; exploration spend (20-F)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF?
option_scan.evidence: BMW $15M advance restricted; Ucore REE offtake LOI August 2025 (20-F)

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: 42% Tanbreez; 20% Weinebene/Eastern Alps lithium; Wolfsberg subsidiary (20-F)

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: No operating revenue from mining yet

stance.rationale: Pre-production resource option; base risked payoff below 15% hurdle at $6.40

marvin_floor.notes: Cash per share at June 30, 2025; not a durable floor given burn and going concern

blended_best.notes: Risked seven-year asset payoff; filings only; no approved third-party blend

growth_explanation.mechanism: Value creation requires Tanbreez DFS, Greenland approvals, project financing, and first production — not operating cash flow compounding.
falsifiers: DFS delayed beyond 2026 or fails economic viability test
GEM arbitration forces material cash or share settlement
